title: ICSE 2027 Program Committee
content: I am on the Program Committee for [ICSE 2027 Research Track](https://conf.researchr.org/track/icse-2027/icse-2027-research-track).

title: I will be at FSE 2026 in Montréal in July
content: Papers accepted to [doctoral symposium](https://conf.researchr.org/track/fse-2026/fse-2026-doctoral-symposium) and the [HumanAISE workshop](https://humanai4se.github.io/) at [FSE 2026](https://conf.researchr.org/home/fse-2026).

title: FSE 2026 IVR Program Committee
content: I am on the Program Committee of FSE Ideas, Visions and Reflections Track.

title: SUMMIT Code and Artifacts Released
content: [Code and artifacts](https://github.com/oss-u/IssueAnalysis) for our work [SUMMIT: Scaffolding Open Source Software Issue Discussion through Summarization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2308.02780) are now available.

title: Human-Centered AI Reading Group
content: I help organize the [Human-Centered AI Reading Group](https://ianarawjo.github.io/mila-hcai/) at Mila. Please send me a message if you'd like to present!
